svg.text: Regnskapsnoter — production architecture
data flow from raw PDF to analyst-reviewed concept observations · gray = missing, amber = partial, dark blocks = built
① ingestion · brreg-regnskap pipeline (built)
SOURCE PDFs · ~12,879 årsregnskap (2024)
brreg-regnskap pipeline (Cloud Run Job, europe-north1)
downloads BRREG public årsregnskap PDFs by orgnr+year
page_classifier.build_manifest() — split BRREG (1728px) vs company (1653px) pages
positional types: p1=generell_info, p2=resultatregnskap, p3=balanse, ... noter
gs://brreg-regnskap/regnskap/{orgnr}/aarsregnskap_{year}.pdf
12,879 PDFs available for downstream pipelines
(shards 0–1 active in production; shards 2–9 paused post-Easter)
MULTI-DGP PRINCIPLE · core to the design
each producer = separate DGP-aspect of the same document
Naive empiricism rejects cross-source unification at write time.
Each engine produces its own observation ledger. Voting happens at query time.
For OCR: 7-voter cascade (ocr-cascade-eval @ ffe4d35) treats every engine's output
as an independent DGP. 81/100 unanimous · 99/100 reliable (≥7/10) · 0 universal-miss
implication for regnskapnoter-py: store creator on every annotation event;
cross-engine voting is a query-time operation on the event log.
② text extraction · 3 producers (multi-DGP) — only path A is in regular production
PATH A · gemini-on-pdf (PRODUCTION)
noter-extraction Cloud Run Job
repo: brreg-regnskap · prompt NOTER_PROMPT_V3
Gemini 2.5 Flash · vertex europe-west1 · thinking_budget=0
~$0.001/entity for combined BRREG-tables + per-entity notes
page-tracked [[p:N]] markers + page_start/page_end
→ gs://sondre_brreg_data/raw/noter_extraction_2025/raw/
{orgnr}_aarsregnskap_{year}_v2.json
cost: ~$13 for full corpus · 4× cheaper than full-PDF baseline
PROD STATUS: shards 0–1 daily; 2–9 paused
PATH B · ocr cascade (BENCHMARKED)
7-voter cascade · ocr-cascade-eval @ ffe4d35
primary OCR ocrmypdf · column-drop sentry tesseract_tsv
redundancy: paddleocr · doctr · easyocr · tesseract · nougat
drop: doctr_bbox · ocrmypdf_hocr · paddleocr_conf (row-cluster brittle)
→ gs://sondre_brreg_data/raw/ocr_bench_11k/{engine}/{orgnr}.json
currently observed engines: tesseract · easyocr · docling · marker · donut · pix2struct
live-validated: tesseract → 89.2% match rate vs Gemini 90.2% (1 concept gap)
live-validated: easyocr → 87.3% match rate
PROD STATUS: benchmark complete; not yet wired into a daily job
PATH C · docling (PROPOSED)
docling-cascade-ocr plugin · structured layout
subclass docling BaseOcrModel; wrap 7 cascade voters as one OCR backend
DoclingDocument output: structured page elements with bbox per token
consumed via rn.from_docling(doc, orgnr=, year=) — adapter exists
design doc complete: registrum-cascade-ocr-plugin spec
reference: github.com/docling-project/docling
STATUS: adapter rn.from_docling shipped (works on a DoclingDocument)
NOT BUILT: the docling-cascade-ocr plugin itself
③ structured extraction · gemini json → tidy CSVs (built but with limits)
noter-extraction-tidy-tables · 15 build_tables
repo: noter-extraction-tidy-tables · skill present in /mnt/skills/user/
manual hand-coding workflow: read JSON · code build_tables.py · emit one CSV per (table, orgnr)
tables: skatt_aaret · egenkapital_summary · lonn_ytelser · garantier · aksjekapital_struktur · ...
→ gs://sondre_brreg_data/raw/noter_extraction_2025/structured/{table}/{orgnr}.csv
15 tables × 152 rows for orgnr 811722332/2024 — validated end-to-end
scale: each orgnr requires hand-coding · slow · per-firm not population-scale
noter-parser · auto deterministic cascade (PARTIAL)
repos: noter-text-extraction + noter-parser
Tier 0: regex · Tier 1: rapidfuzz WRatio≥95 · Tier 2: BGE-M3 cosine≥0.78 · Tier 3: LLM router (Haiku 4.5 opt-in)
Pandera-style identity validators: aksjekap+innskutt+opptjent ≈ sum_egenkapital · etc
canonical schema in canonical_schema.py · 14 tidy tables target
STATUS: built but not yet population-run · ~6–12 h on Colab Pro for 12,860 firms
replaces hand-coding workflow when validated; not yet in production cron
④ taxonomy · regnskapnoter-taxonomy v1.0.2 (built)
regnskapnoter-taxonomy v1.0.2
authoritative concept dictionary · CC-BY-4.0
gs://regnskapnoter-taxonomy/latest/
279 concepts · 100% definition coverage · 4159 RDF triples
230 build_tables column→concept_id mappings · 4 axes / 31 members · calc arcs
consumed by canonicalize() → long (orgnr, year, concept_id, value)
regnskapnoter-py · canonicalize + build_annotations
repo: regnskapnoter-py @ v0.7.0 · 69 tests · CI green
canonicalize(df, table=) → long observations · 152 rows from 15 tables for one firm
build_annotations(doc, observations) → WADM annotations · 194 / 184 matched / 95% rate
6 input adapters: gemini · text_pages · text_blob · tesseract_tsv · cloud_vision · docling
universal OCR text input — every cascade voter is a usable input
⑤ annotation event log · gcs append-only (built)
GCSAnnotationStore · per-(orgnr, year) shard
gs://sondre_brreg_data/annotations/noter/{orgnr}/{year}/events.parquet
20 columns · event_id (sha256 dedup) · sequence (0=post · 1+=mutations) · event_type · concept_id ·
value · selector_json · match_status · creator · rationale · citation · confidence · created (UTC)
naive empiricism: every action immutable; current state composed at query time;
seq=0 'post' row never modified — original auto-extraction view always retrievable.
live validation orgnr 811722332/2024: 102 post events · idempotency PASS · re-anchor · reclassify · delete · all PASS
creator field enables multi-engine voting: query latest event per (annotation_id, creator) for cross-DGP consensus
⑥ llm analyst loop · closes the unmatched gap (built · validated only on small batches)
examples/llm_analyst.py · gemini 2.5 flash · vertex europe-west1
deployable as Cloud Run Job + Cloud Scheduler hourly trigger
for each unmatched annotation: full source PDF + raw JSON + observation context inline to Gemini
structured output: action ∈ {re-anchor, reclassify, propose-concept, delete} · confidence-gated dispatch
MIN_CONFIDENCE=0.6 default · sub-threshold decisions stay in queue for next pass
examples/Dockerfile + examples/deploy.sh ship Cloud Run + Scheduler in one bash invocation
STATUS: end-to-end mocked tests pass · live validation only on synthetic single-shard mutations
cost watch: full PDF inlined per call · ~$0.001/call · ~40k calls for full corpus → $40 budget
CROSS-ENGINE VOTING (MISSING)
multi-DGP consensus on the event log
For each (annotation_id), aggregate events across creators:
gemini → match_status=matched, value=1100
tesseract → match_status=matched, value=1100
easyocr → match_status=unmatched
Emit consensus row when ≥k engines agree.
Reuses xalign_vote logic from ocr-cascade-eval.
SHIP: ~50 lines on top of GCSAnnotationStore.history()
⑦ downstream consumers · what the annotated data feeds
FIRM-DETERIORATION MODEL (BUILT, separate)
firm-deterioration repo · AUC=0.894 · konkurs classifier
consumes finstat.parquet + structured noter values
+0.153 AUC gain from organisasjonsform + NACE base rate + log(employees)
model F (konkurs): AUC 0.986 at exit (not predictive — features contemporaneous)
currently consumes Gemini-extracted CSVs · could switch to event-log latest state
XBRL EMITTER (MISSING)
regnskap-no concepts → XBRL facts
map (orgnr, year, concept_id, value, axis_members) → XBRL fact
target: ESEF / SBR-Nordic alignment
validator: Arelle
design doc exists in regnskapsnoter monorepo plan; package not built
SHACL VALIDATION (MISSING)
regnskapsnoter-shacl · cross-concept identity rules
SHACL shapes encode regnskapsloven identity rules:
SumEgenkapital = Aksjekapital + Overkurs + AnnenInnskutt + ...
tolerance: 0.1% relative or 1 NOK absolute (rounding-grade)
design exists; shapes file would be a few hundred lines
daily job schedule · production cron timeline (existing + missing)
europe/oslo daily execution order
06:00 kunngjoring-collector → gs://brreg_scrape/kunngjoring/
06:30 brreg-downloader → gs://publicpannelbrreg/
[bulk JSON for all enheter]
07:00 roller / foretakshendelser → cdc/changelog/
07:15 enheter / underenheter → parsed/v1/state/{date}.parquet
??:?? noter-extraction (gemini)
→ raw/noter_extraction_2025/raw/ ← shards 0–1 only · 2–9 paused
??:?? noter-extraction (cascade)
MISSING: daily OCR cascade run on the same 12k PDFs
??:?? noter-parser (auto-cascade)
MISSING: deterministic Tier-0..3 over the JSONs into structured CSVs
??:?? rn push (build_annotations)
MISSING: Cloud Run Job that loops orgnr/year → posts events to GCS shard
??:?? rn-analyst (LLM loop)
DESIGNED: examples/deploy.sh ready · not yet deployed
??:?? cross-engine voting
MISSING: multi-DGP consensus over event log (~50 lines)
